## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Dependency update

## Checklist

- [ ] My code builds with zero TypeScript errors (`npm run build`)
- [ ] I have tested the changes in Chrome/Edge
- [ ] Accessibility is maintained (aria labels, focus rings, semantic HTML)
- [ ] No new warnings are introduced
